headline: TE Connectivity maintains position on Dow Jones Best-In-Class Index through continued sustainability, governance efforts
summary: TE Connectivity, a world leader in connectors and sensors, has been named to the Dow Jones Best-In-Class Index for the 14th consecutive year.

headline: TE Connectivity plc (NYSE:TEL): A Value Opportunity with Strong Fundamentals
summary: TE Connectivity offers strong value with a 7/10 rating, combining cheap valuation, excellent profitability (8/10), and solid financial health (8/10), making it a compelling pick for value investors.
